footer.description: Your Lightning Fast Delivery Partner. Providing reliable, secure, and fast logistics solutions globally.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe for latest logistics news and updates.

contactCta.title: Ready to optimise your European supply chain?
contactCta.subtitle: Contact WINZ for customs clearance, container transport, warehousing, and tailored logistics solutions for your business.

banner.title: We value your privacy
banner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze site traffic, and enhance performance. Learn more in our

modal.title: Cookie Preferences
modal.description: Choose which cookies you allow. You can update these settings at any time from the footer.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: Required for core site functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility. These cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors use the website so we can improve performance and user experience.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to deliver relevant content and measure the effectiveness of marketing campaigns.

preferences.title: Preference Cookies
preferences.description: Remember your choices such as language or region to provide a more personalized experience.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how WINZ Logistics collects, uses, and protects personal information when you use our website.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.body: We may collect technical data such as browser type, device information, and pages visited when you interact with our website or contact us.

sections.title: How we use information
sections.body: We use collected information to operate our services, respond to inquiries, improve website performance, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Cookies and tracking
sections.body: We use cookies and similar technologies for essential functionality, analytics, and optional preferences. You can manage non-essential cookies through our cookie banner or Cookie Settings link.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: Depending on applicable law, you may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at info@winz.be.

cookies.heading: Cookies Policy
cookies.intro: This policy describes the types of cookies used on the WINZ website and how you can control them.
cookies.manageBody: You can accept, reject, or customize non-essential cookies at any time.

sections.title: What are cookies?
sections.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help websites function, remember preferences, and understand usage patterns.

sections.title: Cookie categories
sections.body: We use necessary cookies for core functionality, and optional analytics, marketing, and preference cookies that only run with your consent.

sections.title: How to change preferences
sections.body: Use the Cookie Settings link in the website footer or the manage preferences option in the cookie banner to update your choices at any time.
